title: iptables bug fix update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[[1.8.11-9.0.1.el10]]
- Also allow installation with kernel-uek-extra-netfilter [Orabug: 37585869]
- Update dependencies for additional UEK kernel flavours [Orabug: 38000003]

[[1.8.11-9.el10]]
- xshared: Accept an option if any given command allows it (Phil Sutter) [RHEL-72061]
- extensions: icmp: Support info-request/-reply type names (Phil Sutter) [RHEL-85286]
full_text:
[[1.8.11-9.0.1.el10]]
- Also allow installation with kernel-uek-extra-netfilter [Orabug: 37585869]
- Update dependencies for additional UEK kernel flavours [Orabug: 38000003]

[[1.8.11-9.el10]]
- xshared: Accept an option if any given command allows it (Phil Sutter) [RHEL-72061]
- extensions: icmp: Support info-request/-reply type names (Phil Sutter) [RHEL-85286]

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-16439.html
